subcodes.first_line: O lovers of the kind Beloved! Well is it, well is it, that on this auspicious day ye have awakened and become aware [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشقان دلبر مهربان زهی زهی که در این روز فیروز بیدار شدید و هوشیار گشتید و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for the departed, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
